title: Minimum Length Substring with Unique Characters and K Swaps

statement.markdown: Given a string s and an integer k, find the minimum length of a substring that contains all unique characters from s, which can be made unique by at most k swaps (replacing one character with another one).
statement.inputFormat: The input will contain a string s and an integer k, separated by a space.
statement.outputFormat: The output will be the minimum length of a substring with all unique characters that can be made unique by at most k swaps.
statement.notes: The swaps can only be done within the substring, not outside it.

functionSignature.cpp: int minLen(int n, string& s, int k);
functionSignature.java: public int minLen(int n, String s, int k);
functionSignature.python: def solve(self, s: str, k: int) -> int:
